en: So we have a bacon sandwich.
What's this called, is this a Reuben?
I can tell you without eating it, not my thing.
ko: 먹어보지 않아도 내 취향 아닌 거 알아.

en: This though, I will have a delicious bite.
For anybody wondering, aren't you Jewish?
Yes, and I'm bad at it.
This was what fortified me for basically
ko: 이게 해리포터 마지막 세 편 찍을 때 저를 먹여 살린 거예요.

en: the last three Harry Potter films.
ko: 매일 출근해서 하나, 아니면 두 개씩

en: I would come to work every day and have one,
if not two, bacon sandwiches with just ketchup.
And it's truly, that was, what a great life.
